en: Blessed are those whose way is blameless, who walk in the law of the LORD!
zh: 行為完全， 遵行耶和華律法的，都是有福的。

en: Blessed are those who keep his testimonies, who seek him with their whole heart,
zh: 謹守他的法度， 全心尋求他的，都是有福的。

en: who also do no wrong, but walk in his ways!
zh: 他們不作不義的事； 他們遵行他的道。

en: You have commanded your precepts to be kept diligently.
zh: 你曾把你的訓詞吩咐我們， 要我們殷勤遵守。

en: Oh that my ways may be steadfast in keeping your statutes!
zh: 但願我的道路堅定， 為要遵守你的律例。

en: Then I shall not be put to shame, having my eyes fixed on all your commandments.
zh: 我重視你的一切誡命， 就不至於羞愧。

en: I will praise you with an upright heart, when I learn your righteous rules.
zh: 我學會了你公義的法則， 就以正直的心稱謝你。

en: I will keep your statutes; do not utterly forsake me!
zh: 我必遵守你的律例， 求你不要把我棄絕。

en: How can a young man keep his way pure? By guarding it according to your word.
zh: 少年人用甚麼潔淨自己的行為呢？ 就是要遵守你的話。

en: With my whole heart I seek you; let me not wander from your commandments!
zh: 我一心尋求你， 求你不要容我偏離你的誡命。

en: I have stored up your word in my heart, that I might not sin against you.
zh: 我把你的話藏在心裡， 免得我得罪你。

en: Blessed are you, O LORD; teach me your statutes!
zh: 耶和華啊！你是該受稱頌的； 求你把你的律例教導我。

en: With my lips I declare all the rules of your mouth.
zh: 我用嘴唇傳揚從你口中所出的一切典章。

en: In the way of your testimonies I delight as much as in all riches.
zh: 我喜歡你法度定下的道路， 如同喜歡一切財富。

en: I will meditate on your precepts and fix my eyes on your ways.
zh: 我要默想你的訓詞， 重視你的道路。

en: I will delight in your statutes; I will not forget your word.
zh: 我喜愛你的律例， 我不會忘記你的話。

en: Deal bountifully with your servant, that I may live and keep your word.
zh: 求你恩待你的僕人， 使我可以活著， 也可以謹守你的話。

en: Open my eyes, that I may behold wondrous things out of your law.
zh: 求你開我的眼睛， 使我能看出你律法的奇妙。

en: I am a sojourner on the earth; hide not your commandments from me!
zh: 我是在世上作寄居的， 求你不要向我隱瞞你的命令。

en: My soul is consumed with longing for your rules at all times.
zh: 我常常切慕你的典章， 以致我心力交瘁。

en: You rebuke the insolent, accursed ones, who wander from your commandments.
zh: 那些受咒詛的傲慢人，和那些偏離了你誡命的人， 你必斥責他們。

en: Take away from me scorn and contempt, for I have kept your testimonies.
zh: 求你除去我所受的羞辱和藐視， 因為我遵守你的法度。

en: Even though princes sit plotting against me, your servant will meditate on your statutes.
zh: 雖有作領袖的坐著毀謗我， 你的僕人卻默想你的律例。

en: Your testimonies are my delight; they are my counselors.
zh: 你的法度是我的喜樂， 是我的謀士。

en: My soul clings to the dust; give me life according to your word!
zh: 我快要歸回塵土， 求你按著你的話把我救活過來。

en: When I told of my ways, you answered me; teach me your statutes!
zh: 我陳明我所行的，你就應允了我； 求你把你的律例教導我。

en: Make me understand the way of your precepts, and I will meditate on your wondrous works.
zh: 求你使我明白你的訓詞， 我就默想你的奇妙。

en: My soul melts away for sorrow; strengthen me according to your word!
zh: 我因愁苦而流淚， 求你照著你的話使我堅強。

en: Put false ways far from me and graciously teach me your law!
zh: 求你使我離開虛謊的路， 施恩把你的律法賜給我。

en: I have chosen the way of faithfulness; I set your rules before me.
zh: 我揀選了信實的道路， 我把你的典章擺在我面前。

en: I cling to your testimonies, O LORD; let me not be put to shame!
zh: 我緊守你的法度， 耶和華啊！求你不要使我蒙羞。

en: I will run in the way of your commandments when you enlarge my heart!
zh: 因為你使我的心舒暢， 我就跑在你誡命的路上。

en: Teach me, O LORD, the way of your statutes; and I will keep it to the end.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你把你的律例指教我， 我必遵守到底。

en: Give me understanding, that I may keep your law and observe it with my whole heart.
zh: 求你賜我悟性，我好遵守你的律法， 我必一心謹守。

en: Lead me in the path of your commandments, for I delight in it.
zh: 求你領我走在你誡命的路上， 因為這是我喜悅的。

en: Incline my heart to your testimonies, and not to selfish gain!
zh: 求你使我的心傾向你的法度， 不傾向不義之財。

en: Turn my eyes from looking at worthless things; and give me life in your ways.
zh: 求你使我轉眼不看虛空的事； 又使我在你的道中存活。

en: Confirm to your servant your promise, that you may be feared.
zh: 求你向你的僕人實踐你的諾言， 就是你向敬畏你的人所應許的。

en: Turn away the reproach that I dread, for your rules are good.
zh: 求你使我所怕的羞辱離開我， 因為你的典章都是美好的。

en: Behold, I long for your precepts; in your righteousness give me life!
zh: 我切慕你的訓詞，求你使我活在你的公義中。

en: Let your steadfast love come to me, O LORD, your salvation according to your promise;
zh: 耶和華啊！願你照著你的應許， 使你的慈愛、你的救恩臨到我。

en: then shall I have an answer for him who taunts me, for I trust in your word.
zh: 我就有話回答那羞辱我的， 因為我倚靠你的話。

en: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth, for my hope is in your rules.
zh: 求你使真理的話總不離開我的口， 因為我仰望你的典章。

en: I will keep your law continually, forever and ever,
zh: 我要常常謹守你的律法， 直到永遠。

en: and I shall walk in a wide place, for I have sought your precepts.
zh: 我必行在寬闊之處， 因為我一向尋求你的訓詞。

en: I will also speak of your testimonies before kings and shall not be put to shame,
zh: 我在君王面前講論你的法度， 也不以為恥。

en: for I find my delight in your commandments, which I love.
zh: 我要以你的誡命為樂， 這些誡命是我所愛的。

en: I will lift up my hands toward your commandments, which I love, and I will meditate on your statutes.
zh: 我又要向你的誡命舉手，這些誡命是我所愛的； 我也要默想你的律例。

en: Remember your word to your servant, in which you have made me hope.
zh: 求你記念你向你僕人應許的話， 因為你使我有盼望。

en: This is my comfort in my affliction, that your promise gives me life.
zh: 你的應許使我存活； 這就是我在困苦中的安慰。

en: The insolent utterly deride me, but I do not turn away from your law.
zh: 驕傲的人苛刻地譏誚我， 我卻沒有偏離你的律法。

en: When I think of your rules from of old, I take comfort, O LORD.
zh: 耶和華啊！我思念你在古時賜下的典章， 我就得了安慰。

en: Hot indignation seizes me because of the wicked, who forsake your law.
zh: 因為惡人離棄你的律法， 我就非常忿怒。

en: Your statutes have been my songs in the house of my sojourning.
zh: 在我寄居的住所裡， 你的律例成了我的詩歌。

en: I remember your name in the night, O LORD, and keep your law.
zh: 耶和華啊！我在夜間記念你的名， 我要謹守你的律法。

en: This blessing has fallen to me, that I have kept your precepts.
zh: 我這樣作， 是因為我遵守你的訓詞。

en: The LORD is my portion; I promise to keep your words.
zh: 耶和華啊！你是我的業分， 我曾說我要謹守你的話。

en: I entreat your favor with all my heart; be gracious to me according to your promise.
zh: 我曾一心向你乞恩， 願你照著你的應許恩待我。

en: When I think on my ways, I turn my feet to your testimonies;
zh: 我思想我所行的道路， 就轉回腳步歸向你的法度。

en: I hasten and do not delay to keep your commandments.
zh: 我趕快謹守你的命令， 不敢耽延。

en: Though the cords of the wicked ensnare me, I do not forget your law.
zh: 惡人的繩索雖然捆綁我， 我卻不忘記你的律法。

en: At midnight I rise to praise you, because of your righteous rules.
zh: 因你公義的典章， 我半夜起來稱謝你。

en: I am a companion of all who fear you, of those who keep your precepts.
zh: 凡是敬畏你，謹守你訓詞的， 我都與他們為友。

en: The earth, O LORD, is full of your steadfast love; teach me your statutes!
zh: 耶和華啊！你的慈愛遍滿大地； 求你把你的律例教導我。

en: You have dealt well with your servant, O LORD, according to your word.
zh: 耶和華啊！你向來照著你的話， 善待你的僕人。

en: Teach me good judgment and knowledge, for I believe in your commandments.
zh: 求你把聰明和知識指教我， 因為我信靠你的命令。

en: Before I was afflicted I went astray, but now I keep your word.
zh: 我受苦以先，犯了錯誤； 現在我謹守你的話。

en: You are good and do good; teach me your statutes.
zh: 你本是良善的，你所行的也是良善的； 求你把你的律例教導我。

en: The insolent smear me with lies, but with my whole heart I keep your precepts;
zh: 傲慢人用謊言中傷我， 我卻一心遵守你的訓詞。

en: their heart is unfeeling like fat, but I delight in your law.
zh: 他們的心麻木如同脂油， 我卻喜歡你的律法。

en: It is good for me that I was afflicted, that I might learn your statutes.
zh: 我受苦是對我有益的， 為要使我學習你的律例。

en: The law of your mouth is better to me than thousands of gold and silver pieces.
zh: 你口中的律法對我有益， 勝過千千萬萬的金銀。

en: Your hands have made and fashioned me; give me understanding that I may learn your commandments.
zh: 你的手造了我，建立了我； 求你使我有悟性，可以學習你的命令。

en: Those who fear you shall see me and rejoice, because I have hoped in your word.
zh: 願敬畏你的人看見我就歡喜， 因為我仰望你的話。

en: I know, O LORD, that your rules are righteous, and that in faithfulness you have afflicted me.
zh: 耶和華啊！我知道你的判語是公義的， 為了你的信實，你使我受苦。

en: Let your steadfast love comfort me according to your promise to your servant.
zh: 求你按著你給你僕人的應許， 以你的慈愛安慰我。

en: Let your mercy come to me, that I may live; for your law is my delight.
zh: 願你的憐憫臨到我，使我活著， 因為我喜歡你的律法。

en: Let the insolent be put to shame, because they have wronged me with falsehood; as for me, I will meditate on your precepts.
zh: 願傲慢人蒙羞，因為他們以詭詐誣衊我； 至於我，我卻要默想你的訓詞。

en: Let those who fear you turn to me, that they may know your testimonies.
zh: 願敬畏你、知道你法度的人， 都歸向我；

en: May my heart be blameless in your statutes, that I may not be put to shame!
zh: 願我的心在你的律例上無可指摘， 使我不至蒙羞。

en: My soul longs for your salvation; I hope in your word.
zh: 我渴望你的救恩以致心力衰竭， 但我仍仰望你的話。

en: My eyes long for your promise; I ask, "When will you comfort me?"
zh: 我仰望你的應許以致眼睛昏花， 我說：“你甚麼時候才安慰我呢？”

en: For I have become like a wineskin in the smoke, yet I have not forgotten your statutes.
zh: 我雖然好像煙薰的皮袋， 我卻沒有忘記你的律例。

en: How long must your servant endure? When will you judge those who persecute me?
zh: 你僕人的日子還有多少？ 你甚麼時候才向那些逼迫我的人施行審判呢？

en: The insolent have dug pitfalls for me; they do not live according to your law.
zh: 傲慢人為我掘了坑， 他們就是那些不按著你律法而行的人。

en: All your commandments are sure; they persecute me with falsehood; help me!
zh: 你的一切命令都是可信靠的； 他們以詭詐逼迫我，求你幫助我。

en: They have almost made an end of me on earth, but I have not forsaken your precepts.
zh: 他們幾乎把我從世上除滅了； 至於我，我卻沒有離棄你的訓詞。

en: In your steadfast love give me life, that I may keep the testimonies of your mouth.
zh: 求你照著你的慈愛使我存活， 我就必謹守你口中的法度。

en: Forever, O LORD, your word is firmly fixed in the heavens.
zh: 耶和華啊！你的話存到永遠， 堅立在天上。

en: Your faithfulness endures to all generations; you have established the earth, and it stands fast.
zh: 你的信實存到萬代； 你堅立了地，地就長存。

en: By your appointment they stand this day, for all things are your servants.
zh: 天地照著你的安排存到今日， 因為萬有都是你的僕役。

en: If your law had not been my delight, I would have perished in my affliction.
zh: 如果我不是喜歡你的律法， 就早已在苦難中滅亡了。

en: I will never forget your precepts, for by them you have given me life.
zh: 我永遠不會忘記你的訓詞， 因為你用這些訓詞使我存活。

en: I am yours; save me, for I have sought your precepts.
zh: 我是屬於你的，求你拯救我， 因為我尋求你的訓詞。

en: The wicked lie in wait to destroy me, but I consider your testimonies.
zh: 惡人等待著要把我毀滅， 我卻思考你的法度。

en: I have seen a limit to all perfection, but your commandment is exceedingly broad.
zh: 我看一切圓滿的事都有盡頭， 只有你的命令是廣闊無邊的。

en: Oh how I love your law! It is my meditation all the day.
zh: 我多麼愛慕你的律法， 終日不住地默想。

en: Your commandment makes me wiser than my enemies, for it is ever with me.
zh: 你的命令使我比我的仇敵更有智慧， 因為你的命令常存在我裡面。

en: I have more understanding than all my teachers, for your testimonies are my meditation.
zh: 我比我所有的老師明智， 因為我默想你的法度。

en: I understand more than the aged, for I keep your precepts.
zh: 我比老年人更明理， 因為我遵守你的訓詞。

en: I hold back my feet from every evil way, in order to keep your word.
zh: 我制止我的腳不走任何邪惡的路， 為要謹守你的話。

en: I do not turn aside from your rules, for you have taught me.
zh: 我沒有偏離你的典章， 因為你親自教導了我。

en: How sweet are your words to my taste, sweeter than honey to my mouth!
zh: 你的話語在我的上膛多麼甜美， 在我的口中比蜂蜜更甜。

en: Through your precepts I get understanding; therefore I hate every false way.
zh: 我藉著你的訓詞，得以明白事理； 因此，我恨惡一切虛謊的道。

en: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.
zh: 你的話是我腳前的燈， 是我路上的光。

en: I have sworn an oath and confirmed it, to keep your righteous rules.
zh: 我曾起誓，並且堅守誓言， 我必遵守你公義的典章。

en: I am severely afflicted; give me life, O LORD, according to your word!
zh: 我受苦極重； 耶和華啊！求你照著你的應許使我存活。

en: Accept my freewill offerings of praise, O LORD, and teach me your rules.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你悅納我口中的甘心祭， 又把你的典章教導我。

en: I hold my life in my hand continually, but I do not forget your law.
zh: 我的性命常在危險中， 我卻沒有忘記你的律法。

en: The wicked have laid a snare for me, but I do not stray from your precepts.
zh: 惡人雖然設下陷阱要害我， 我卻沒有偏離你的訓詞。

en: Your testimonies are my heritage forever, for they are the joy of my heart.
zh: 我以你的法度為我永遠的產業； 因為它們是我心中的喜樂。

en: I incline my heart to perform your statutes forever, to the end.
zh: 我專心遵行你的律例， 永不改變，遵行到底。

en: I hate the double-minded, but I love your law.
zh: 我恨惡心懷二意的人， 我卻喜愛你的律法。

en: You are my hiding place and my shield; I hope in your word.
zh: 你是我的避難所，我的盾牌； 我仰望你的話。

en: Depart from me, you evildoers, that I may keep the commandments of my God.
zh: 作惡的人哪！你們離開我吧， 好讓我遵守我 神的命令。

en: Uphold me according to your promise, that I may live, and let me not be put to shame in my hope!
zh: 求你照著你的應許扶持我，使我存活； 不要使我因仰望你而蒙羞。

en: Hold me up, that I may be safe and have regard for your statutes continually!
zh: 求你扶持我，我就必得救； 我必常常重視你的律例。

en: You spurn all who go astray from your statutes, for their cunning is in vain.
zh: 偏離你的律例的，你都把他們棄絕； 他們的詭詐是徒然的。

en: All the wicked of the earth you discard like dross, therefore I love your testimonies.
zh: 世上所有的惡人，你都把他們除滅，如同除去渣滓， 因此我喜愛你的法度。

en: My flesh trembles for fear of you, and I am afraid of your judgments.
zh: 我因懼怕你而戰慄； 我畏懼你的審判。

en: I have done what is just and right; do not leave me to my oppressors.
zh: 我曾秉公行義； 求你不要把我撇下，交給欺壓我的人。

en: Give your servant a pledge of good; let not the insolent oppress me.
zh: 求你作你僕人的保證人，確保我的好處； 不要容傲慢人欺壓我。

en: My eyes long for your salvation and for the fulfillment of your righteous promise.
zh: 因盼望你的救恩和你公義的應許， 我的眼睛都昏花了。

en: Deal with your servant according to your steadfast love, and teach me your statutes.
zh: 求你按著你的慈愛待你的僕人， 把你的律例教導我。

en: I am your servant; give me understanding, that I may know your testimonies!
zh: 我是你的僕人，求你賜我悟性， 使我可以明白你的法度。

en: It is time for the LORD to act, for your law has been broken.
zh: 現在是耶和華行動的時候； 因為人都違犯了你的律法。

en: Therefore I love your commandments above gold, above fine gold.
zh: 因此我愛你的命令， 勝過金子，甚至勝過精金。

en: Therefore I consider all your precepts to be right; I hate every false way.
zh: 在一切事上，你所有的訓詞我都視為正直； 我恨惡一切虛謊的道。

en: Your testimonies are wonderful; therefore my soul keeps them.
zh: 你的法度奇妙， 所以我必遵守你的法度，

en: The unfolding of your words gives light; it imparts understanding to the simple.
zh: 你的話一解開，就發出亮光， 使愚人有悟性。

en: I open my mouth and pant, because I long for your commandments.
zh: 我張口喘氣， 因為我切慕你的命令。

en: Turn to me and be gracious to me, as is your way with those who love your name.
zh: 求你轉向我，恩待我； 像你素常對待那些愛你名的人那樣。

en: Keep steady my steps according to your promise, and let no iniquity get dominion over me.
zh: 求你用你的話引導我的腳步， 不容甚麼罪孽轄制我。

en: Redeem me from man's oppression, that I may keep your precepts.
zh: 求你救贖我脫離人的欺壓， 好讓我謹守你的訓詞。

en: Make your face shine upon your servant, and teach me your statutes.
zh: 求你用你的臉光照你的僕人， 把你的律例教導我。

en: My eyes shed streams of tears, because people do not keep your law.
zh: 我的眼淚像河水湧流， 因為人都不謹守你的律法。

en: Righteous are you, O LORD, and right are your rules.
zh: 耶和華啊！你是公義的， 你的判詞也是正直的。

en: You have appointed your testimonies in righteousness and in all faithfulness.
zh: 你以公義和至誠， 命定了你的法度。

en: My zeal consumes me, because my foes forget your words.
zh: 我心中迫切如同火燒， 因為我的敵人忘記了你的話。

en: Your promise is well tried, and your servant loves it.
zh: 你的話語十分精煉， 因此你的僕人喜愛你的話語。

en: I am small and despised, yet I do not forget your precepts.
zh: 我雖然微小，被人藐視， 我卻沒有忘記你的訓詞。

en: Your righteousness is righteous forever, and your law is true.
zh: 你的公義是永遠的公義， 你的律法是可信可靠的。

en: Trouble and anguish have found me out, but your commandments are my delight.
zh: 我遭遇患難和困苦， 但你的命令仍是我歡喜的。

en: Your testimonies are righteous forever; give me understanding that I may live.
zh: 你的法度永遠是公義的， 求你賜我悟性， 好讓我存活。

en: With my whole heart I cry; answer me, O LORD! I will keep your statutes.
zh: 耶和華啊！我一心呼求你，求你應允我； 我必遵守你的律例。

en: I call to you; save me, that I may observe your testimonies.
zh: 我向你呼求，求你救我； 我必謹守你的法度。

en: I rise before dawn and cry for help; I hope in your words.
zh: 天還未亮我就呼求救助， 我所仰望的就是你的話。

en: My eyes are awake before the watches of the night, that I may meditate on your promise.
zh: 我整夜睜開眼睛， 為要默想你的話語。

en: Hear my voice according to your steadfast love; O LORD, according to your justice give me life.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你照著你的慈愛垂聽我的聲音， 求你按著你的公正使我存活。

en: They draw near who persecute me with evil purpose; they are far from your law.
zh: 追求奸惡的人臨近了， 他們遠離你的律法。

en: But you are near, O LORD, and all your commandments are true.
zh: 耶和華啊！你和我十分接近， 你的一切命令都是可信可靠的。

en: Long have I known from your testimonies that you have founded them forever.
zh: 我從你的法度早已知道， 這些法度是你立定，存到永遠的。

en: Look on my affliction and deliver me, for I do not forget your law.
zh: 求你察看我的苦難，搭救我； 因為我沒有忘記你的律法。

en: Plead my cause and redeem me; give me life according to your promise!
zh: 求你為我的案件申辯，救贖我； 按著你的應許使我存活。

en: Salvation is far from the wicked, for they do not seek your statutes.
zh: 救恩遠離惡人， 因為他們不尋求你的律例。

en: Great is your mercy, O LORD; give me life according to your rules.
zh: 耶和華啊！你的憐憫浩大； 求你照著你的公正使我存活。

en: Many are my persecutors and my adversaries, but I do not swerve from your testimonies.
zh: 逼迫我的和敵擋我的很多， 但我沒有偏離你的法度。

en: I look at the faithless with disgust, because they do not keep your commands.
zh: 我看見詭詐的人就討厭， 因為他們不遵守你的話語。

en: Consider how I love your precepts! Give me life according to your steadfast love.
zh: 你看我多麼愛你的訓詞； 耶和華啊！求你按著你的慈愛使我存活。

en: The sum of your word is truth, and every one of your righteous rules endures forever.
zh: 你的話的總綱就是真理， 你一切公義的典章要存到永遠。

en: Princes persecute me without cause, but my heart stands in awe of your words.
zh: 領袖們無緣無故迫害我， 我的心卻畏懼你的話。

en: I rejoice at your word like one who finds great spoil.
zh: 我因你的話語歡喜， 像得了許多戰利品的人一樣。

en: I hate and abhor falsehood, but I love your law.
zh: 虛偽是我憎恨厭惡的， 你的律法卻是我所愛的。

en: Seven times a day I praise you for your righteous rules.
zh: 我因你公義的典章， 一天七次讚美你。

en: Great peace have those who love your law; nothing can make them stumble.
zh: 喜愛你律法的必有豐盛的平安， 甚麼都不能絆倒他們。

en: I hope for your salvation, O LORD, and I do your commandments.
zh: 耶和華啊！我要等候你的救恩， 我要遵行你的命令。

en: My soul keeps your testimonies; I love them exceedingly.
zh: 我的心謹守你的法度， 這些法度是我熱愛的。

en: I keep your precepts and testimonies, for all my ways are before you.
zh: 我謹守你的訓詞和法度， 因我所行的一切都在你面前。

en: Let my cry come before you, O LORD; give me understanding according to your word!
zh: 耶和華啊！願我的呼求達到你面前； 求你照著你的話賜我悟性。

en: Let my plea come before you; deliver me according to your word.
zh: 願我的懇求達到你面前； 求你照著你的應許拯救我。

en: My lips will pour forth praise, for you teach me your statutes.
zh: 願我的嘴唇湧出讚美的話， 因為你把你的律例教導了我。

en: My tongue will sing of your word, for all your commandments are right.
zh: 願我的舌頭歌唱你的話語， 因為你的一切命令都是公義的。

en: Let your hand be ready to help me, for I have chosen your precepts.
zh: 願你的手幫助我， 因為我選擇了你的訓詞。

en: I long for your salvation, O LORD, and your law is my delight.
zh: 耶和華啊！我渴慕你的救恩， 我喜歡你的律法。

en: Let my soul live and praise you, and let your rules help me.
zh: 求你容我活著，可以讚美你； 願你的典章幫助我。

en: I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek your servant, for I do not forget your commandments.
zh: 我像亡羊走迷了路； 求你尋找你的僕人， 因為我沒有忘記你的命令。
